stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The diagram 1A represents...

options.a: A CDI with a selected VOR radial 230 and is showing from the VOR and to the left.
options.b: An ILS indicator showing you are 0.25 degrees above the glide slope and to the left of the localiser by 1.5 degrees.
options.c: An ILS indicator showing 1 degree above the glide slope and 2.5 degrees to the left of the localiser.
options.d: An ILS indicator showing 0.3 degrees above the glide slope and 0.8 degrees to the left of the localiser.
